=Module <<a_api_type subproject="client" | module Email >> =
<<pre class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|module>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Email>>>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|sig>><<a_api subproject="client" text=".." | module Email >><<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|end>>>>
----
